programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Payback
programme.desc: A mysterious death by poisoning creates questions about the safety of portal technology. When a Taelon is killed in the same manner, the investigation leads to a very smart scientist that even the Resistance was scared to work with.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Friendly Fire
programme.desc: Paul Chandler plots an attack on the Taelon Embassy in DC with the ship he stole from Lili. He begs her to join him in beginning an all out war.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Volunteers
programme.desc: A group of Resistance capture a volunteer from a Taelon program for youth. Liam decides they may learn valuable information from her. They also decide to send in one of their own as a volunteer to see what the program is teaching.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Bliss
programme.desc: Lili is given a psychotropic drug called "bliss" via a Taelon device. They discover it is widespread. With an instantly strong addictive property, the addicts are dying within 48 hours. The investigation leads Liam and Sandoval to Ireland.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Highjacked
programme.desc: With a reporter on board, the Taelon mother ship is highjacked into interdimensional space. Liam is the prime suspect, causing an even bigger rift between Da'an and Zo'or. As the ship floats, lost in space, they must find the real culprit.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Defector
programme.desc: A shuttle crashes on a beach after being pursued by a second Taelon piloted shuttle. When Liam locates the survivor (a Taelon called Belleye), he claims to want to help the Resistance take back Earth from the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Heroes and Heartbreak
programme.desc: Augur is recruited by a Taelon weapons project, but the others are worried about his involvement. When the project is launched earlier than originally planned to fight a Jiridian fleet, the Earth is in danger.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: A Jiridian probe headed for Earth is shot down by the Taelon Embassy and crashes outside of D.C. Liam recovers the probe, but he, Augur, and Julia are captured by another underground resistance movement led by the real Colonel Liam Kincaid.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Crossfire
programme.desc: As the election draws near, Liam believes Zo'or is trying to have Jonathan Doors murdered. The Resistance worries that an attack is imminent at the final debate. Julia mobilizes a group to protect Doors against Liam's wishes.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Crackdown
programme.desc: An unknown woman saves Augur and Liam from the raids on the Resistance. Lili sabotages the mother ship, but Zo'or stops its total destruction. Lili is reportedly dead. The investigation on the President's shooter continues.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Vanished
programme.desc: Some who were detained during the Resistance sweep have not reappeared after their release. Lili is taken to a lab run by Sandoval and implanted. Renee tries to help Liam find the missing people.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Emancipation
programme.desc: A group posing as volunteers attacks using a stolen skrill prototype that does not require an implant to control. It is discovered that the skrill queen is also missing. The investigation leads to a resistance group called Black Wednesday.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Déjà Vu
programme.desc: A joint Doors International/Taelon venture creates a machine that allows people to vividly relive a memory, but Liam suspects a back alley version of the device is leading to the death of some users.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Once and Future World
programme.desc: Artifacts believed to be Taelon are found in South America. Renee and Liam try to beat Sandoval to the source to determine the importance of the found pieces.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Thicker than Blood
programme.desc: An old business partner of Augur's is hired by Da'an to get information about the Resistance, resulting in the death of many members. Meanwhile, Sandoval finds out he has a life threatening blood disorder.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: A Little Bit of Heaven
programme.desc: Liam and Renee investigate a dead pregnant woman missing her fetus. They discover a town that Da'an helped after a nuclear meltdown and a suspicious brother and sister who were part of an early experiment to combine human and Taelon DNA.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Pad'ar
programme.desc: Pad'ar is a fierce battle game where spectators can connect via a "jack patch" that Liam suspects is causing neurological damage to users. When a Pad'ar warrior dies, it raises even more questions about the safety.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: In Memory
programme.desc: Lili wakes up, supposedly on Earth after a coma, and is told the Jaridians have come and conquered the Taelons. She remembers Sandoval telling her she no longer has and Earth-based physiology and believes things are not as they seem.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Cloister
programme.desc: Zo'or and Da'an travel to a cloister for an energy sharing ceremony, but one of the sisters is killed and everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Interview
programme.desc: Zo'or agrees to do a live television interview to try to endear himself to humans, but the show's producer has an ulterior motive in getting him in front of a camera.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Keep Your Enemies Closer
programme.desc: The shuttle Liam and Zo'or are in crashes over wilderness, but survive in safety bubbles. The people they meet live off the earth and know nothing of the Taelons. However, Zo'or is injured and missing a Synod meeting on the mother ship.

programme.title: The Lost World: Birthright
programme.desc: Summerlee, Roxton, and Veronica must outrun a T-rex that's tracking them for dinner. Meanwhile Marguerite, Malone, and Challenger are manipulated by Ramses to help him take his place as pharaoh.

programme.title: The Lost World: Resurrection
programme.desc: Malone and Veronica must defend the treehouse from mercenaries. After being ambushed by Norse warriors, Roxton must take the life of another in order to rise from the dead and save Marguerite.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Chosen One
programme.desc: Roxton is determined to help the chosen one find his way back to the elders and save the star of hope. Veronica and the others worry when Malone begins spending time with a strange women.

programme.title: The Lost World: Prophecy
programme.desc: A fortune teller gives the explorers startling predictions that prove eerily accurate, with Malone receiving a grim fortune Meanwhile Challenger and Summerlee try and evade highly-evolved raptors.

programme.title: The Lost World: Barbarians at the Gate
programme.desc: The explorer's last hope of leaving the plateau is destroyed when Drakul and his men come after them and their hot air balloon. A war breaks out between Drakul and Tribune, now armed with gunpowder.

programme.title: The Lost World: All or Nothing
programme.desc: After watching Summerlee fall from a destroyed bridge, Marguerite and Veronica attempt to find him. Tribune rescues Roxton but expects payment in kind.

programme.title: The Lost World: Amazons
programme.desc: The men find themselves embraced by a tribe of Amazons and discover they are to be studs for the breeding ritual, but this purpose may come with a fatal end.

programme.title: The Lost World: Tourist Season
programme.desc: Challenger builds a windmill. But when his generator is struck by lightning, a portal is opened that ushers in a helicopter carrying a family of tourists from the year 2000.

programme.title: The Lost World: Stone Cold
programme.desc: An ominous castle draws three of the adventurers under its paranormal influence. Roxton, Marguerite, and Malone take on new personalities while the mansion entangles them in a love triangle.

programme.title: The Lost World: Divine Right
programme.desc: A riderless horse leads Roxton to a tribe that makes him king. He must either accept the title or face execution, while the rest of the group is captured.

programme.title: The Lost World: Skin Deep
programme.desc: When Marguerite begins acting uncharacteristically nice, the group raises some questions. A stumbling dinosaur in the jungle holds the answer: an alien life force has begun controlling their bodies.

programme.title: The Lost World: London Calling
programme.desc: Nelson discovers a map that shows a way off the plateau, but he has doubts about leaving. The group has to outrun nomads as they follow the route out of the Lost Word.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Prisoner
programme.desc: A shape-shifter convinces Veronica that her parents are in a place called El Dorado. When Veronica takes off without telling the others, she unwittingly releases a powerful giant from captivity.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Games
programme.desc: Empress Centuria orders her Lizardmen to capture Tribune. When her soldiers find him at the treehouse, he, Malone, Marguerite, and Roxton are imprisoned, and thrown into the Gladiators' Arena.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Source
programme.desc: With all of Lost World thirsting for water, the explorers are attacked by raptors. They are aided by a young woman, Ana, and Marguerite becomes interested in her knowledge of the Fountain of Youth.

programme.title: The Lost World: Trophies
programme.desc: A hunting party arrives on the plateau and takes fire at a Troglodyte child. Though they claim to be there to bring them home, Veronica becomes the target of their gunfire and snares.

programme.title: The Lost World: Voodoo Queen
programme.desc: An alluring stranger named Danielle seeks aide from Roxton and the others after her village is taken by Trogs. But when the woman uses a voodoo doll to bewitch Roxton, the group must rescue her.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Guardian
programme.desc: Challenger is trapped and taken to a village of orphans, protected by dense jungle and a plant that feeds on fresh meat. Marguerite and Veronica must help Challenger escape before they are killed.

programme.title: The Lost World: Under Pressure
programme.desc: A handsome stranger stumbles onto the plateau and becomes close with the explorers. While he gains the attention of Marguerite and Veronica, Challenger's electrostatic accumulator is targeted.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Outlaw
programme.desc: Roxton and Marguerite discover a way through the mountain and explore the fissure in hopes of finding a way off the plateau. Instead, they discover an English town and trouble with the locals.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and Jonathan Pratt embark on a road trip that will take them on a 400-mile journey from Glasgow in Scotland to the Isle of Anglesey.
programme.sub-title: Anita Manning and Jonathan Pratt, Day 1

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Jonathan Pratt visits the world's first savings bank and Anita Manning gets some tips on marriage at Gretna Green on the second leg of their trip.
programme.sub-title: Anita Manning and Jonathan Pratt, Day 2

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and Jonathan Pratt drive from Middleham in Yorkshire through to Halifax in their classic car, looking to make a profit at auction.
programme.sub-title: Anita Manning and Jonathan Pratt, Day 3

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning shows an unusual taste in sculpture and Jonathan Pratt opts for something very shapely as the experts head for north Wales.
programme.sub-title: Anita Manning and Jonathan Pratt, Day 4

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the last leg of their road trip Anita Manning and Jonathan Pratt head for Anglesey for their final auction showdown.
programme.sub-title: Anita Manning and Jonathan Pratt, Day 5

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a brand-new road trip and antiques experts David Harper and Catherine Southon journey through Lancashire heading for their first auction in the sea-faring city of Liverpool.
programme.sub-title: David Harper and Catherine Southon, Day 1

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Harper goes to jail and Catherine Southon goes to church on the second leg of their antiques road trip through north Wales and Shropshire.
programme.sub-title: David Harper and Catherine Southon, Day 2

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts David Harper and Catherine Southon go on a buying spree through mid-Wales on the third leg of their journey from Lancashire to Devon.
programme.sub-title: David Harper and Catherine Southon, Day 3

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Harper brushes shoulders with a TV classic and Catherine Southon gets a taste for one of Gloucester's finest edibles as they head for auction.
programme.sub-title: David Harper and Catherine Southon, Day 4

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon gets to dance and David Harper finds himself financially embarrassed as they head for a final auction showdown at Seaton in Devon.
programme.sub-title: David Harper and Catherine Southon, Day 5

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson join forces in a smart classic car for a 500-mile trip from Cheshire to Winchester on the first leg of their journey.
programme.sub-title: Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson, Day 1

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross goes cricket mad and his rival Charles Hanson goes to the pub and unearths some skulduggery as the pair takes their road trip from Chesterfield to Grantham.
programme.sub-title: Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson, Day 2

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the third leg of their road trip Charles Hanson visits the solicitors and Charlie Ross finds history in an old packet of cigarettes.
programme.sub-title: Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson, Day 3

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charles Hanson buys something he doesn't like and Charlie Ross profits from a most unlikely item en route to auction in Ledbury, Herefordshire.
programme.sub-title: Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson, Day 4

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross takes an expensive gamble and Charles Hanson gets invited to a castle as they head for the winner's enclosure at auction near Winchester.
programme.sub-title: Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson, Day 5

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The tenth season of Antiques Road Trip begins with Philip Serrell taking on Christina Trevanion. Leg one commences in Castle Douglas in Dumfries and Galloway and heads towards the first auction in Newcastle Upon Tyne.
programme.sub-title: Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell, Day 1

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Day two sees auctioneers Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell begin the next leg of their journey. Starting in Keswick in the heart of the North Lakes in Cumbria, they weave their way towards an auction in Crooklands, in the South Lakes.
programme.sub-title: Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell, Day 2

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Halfway through their trip, Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell are neck and neck, having each won an auction. They begin day three in the seaside town of Southport, shop their way around Lancashire and land in Lincoln for the auction.
programme.sub-title: Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell, Day 3

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Auctioneers Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell embark on their penultimate leg. Christina had great success at the last auction. Can Philip catch her up as they kick off in Manchester and head to the auction in Melbourne, near York?
programme.sub-title: Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell, Day 4

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Flight into Darkness
programme.desc: Dr. Stephens believes his anti-gravity research will endanger mankind; he destroys the papers and disappears. Brady is summoned to track him down.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Decoy
programme.desc: Identical twins Toni and Terry Trent are a popular musical act, performing for the troops on a USO tour of Britain. Brady volunteers to help Toni when Terry disappears at a Soho hotel where she had earlier witnessed a murder.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The White Rabbit
programme.desc: French authorities call Peter when a doctor brings in a white rabbit she says materialized out of thin air before her eyes.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Disguise
programme.desc: The Invisible man is investigating an international drug ring when his identity is stolen by a beautiful young woman and used to smuggle drugs.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Gun Runners
programme.desc: Terrorists in an Italian market gun down a family. This sparks an investigation into how the killers got the guns, which Peter is tasked with.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Power
programme.desc: Brady aids the heirs of a Middle East king, who has been murdered by his power-crazy army chief to regain their father's throne.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Shadow Bomb
programme.desc: Peter is called in after a malfunction with a light sensitive bomb and must disarm the weapon before approaching darkness makes detonation inevitable.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Big Plot
programme.desc: Found among the wreckage of a crashed plane are parts of an atomic bomb and Peter uncovers a plot to start a Third World War.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Secret Experiment
programme.desc: After a freak accident while conducting a secret experiment with light refraction, Dr. Peter Brady is transformed into an invisible man.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Crises in the Desert
programme.desc: The British government recruits Brady to go behind lines in the Middle East and rescue one of their top secret agents who has been taken prisoner.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Behind the Mask
programme.desc: Brady helps a horribly disfigured man to become invisible but is soon caught in lies that threaten to destroy the life of a notable politician.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Shadow on the Screen
programme.desc: Peter must board a vessel to rescue a sailor who wants to defect. However, a trap has been set using radar to detect the Invisible Man on a TV screen.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Mink Coat
programme.desc: While vacationing, Peter's sister becomes convinced that the inner-lining of an airplane passenger's fur coat is being used for smuggling purposes.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Locked Room
programme.desc: Peter must infiltrate an embassy to rescue a Russian scientist who wants to defect and has been working to solve the problem of invisibility.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Prize
programme.desc: In Scandinavia, at a prize-awarding ceremony, Peter must rescue a writer being held for speaking out against her repressive government.

programme.title: Harlequin
programme.desc: A dark fantasy thriller with political intrigue.

programme.title: Children of the Corn
programme.desc: A young couple is trapped in a remote town where a dangerous religious cult of children believe everyone over the age of 18 must be killed. Starring: Peter Horton, Linda Hamilton, R.G. Armstrong, John Franklin, Courtney Gains

programme.title: The Beast Must Die
programme.desc: Eight people have been invited to an island estate for the weekend. One of them is a werewolf. Can you guess which one?

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: A small rural town finds itself in the grip of an infection which send its hosts into a violent, homicidal frenzy.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Play to Kill
programme.desc: A celebrated actress runs down a hobo by accident and a witness blackmails her, threatening to expose her secret.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Blind Justice
programme.desc: When an airline pilot is framed for drug smuggling, a killer comes to his home to silence him... and the pilot's blind wife (Honor Blackman) is the only witness.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The White Rabbit
programme.desc: French authorities call Peter when a doctor brings in a white rabbit she says materialized out of thin air before her eyes.

programme.title: The Ape

programme.title: The Little Shop of Horrors

programme.desc: A family moves into a house inhabited by scary creatures. A number of close calls ensue.

programme.title: The Human Centipede III (Final Sequence)
programme.desc: An insane prison warden and his sidekick hatch a plan to simultaneously cut costs and deter prisoner revolt in their overpopulated, underfunded jail

programme.title: Monster Squad: Mr. Mephisto

programme.title: Farscape: The Peacekeeper Wars

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: In an strange turn of events, Steve McGarrett, in pursuing a bigtime drug dealer whom he suspects of having killed a Honolulu police officer, finds himself in bitter conflict with a federal agent.

programme.desc: Steve McGarrett and agent Danny Williams are enmeshed with a pair of frightened surfers, one of whom was actually responsible for the death of a girl, and the other who is on the run because he is strongly suspected of it.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)

programme.desc: "Why are firms owned by virtuous Japanese-American Yuhio Muromoto being bombed by a WW2 memorabilia collector? McGarrett tries to uncover the truth.

programme.desc: The only link in a series of seemingly unrelated killings may lie in a common horoscope by a famous astrologer.

programme.sub-title: Incident of the Edge of Madness

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Trail boss Gil Favor and ramrod Rowdy Yates get a taste of the capricious power of Jed Reston, a cattle and land baron, as they drive their herd north.
programme.sub-title: Incident of the Power and the Plow

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Trail boss Gil Favor and ramrod Rowdy Yates find themselves involved in a brother's crusade for revenge after one of their trail hands suddenly leaves the cattle drive, as they pass through Barker Springs, and subsequently is shot to death.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex tries to polish the diamond-in-the-rough, Louie, into a real gem—while Louie decides to change his image by moving into a fancy apartment building.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex starts driving all the other cabbies crazy when he discovers his beloved family pet only has a short time to live.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine becomes a nervous wreck when her young son decides to give up the oboe and take up boxing under the tutelage of Tony.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Jim's old girlfriend shows up hoping to rekindle their romance, Alex quickly sets out to win her heart away from her former suitor.
programme.sub-title: Alex Gets Burned By An Old Flame

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: On the eve of the biggest fight of his career, Tony loses interest in boxing when his girlfriend announces she may be expecting his baby.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie is worried his blind girlfriend will no longer love him if an operation to restore her sight is successful.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: To what lengths will boyfriend Arnie go to win over Elaine's kids? Elaine is in for a surprise when she invites him over to meet her children.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies come to the rescue when Jim tries to convince his family that he didn't squander his inheritance by buying a run-down restaurant.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Latka worries that Simka's wacky behavior might cost her the right to remain permanently in America.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies embark on a frantic race against time when they team up in a wild nonstop drive from New York to Miami so that Alex can see his long-lost daughter on her twenty-minute layover at the airport in the premiere episode of Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex’s romantic instincts are triggered by the sexy voice at the answering service. Her alluring manner prompts him to arrange a dinner date that turns into a big surprise on Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A pretty girl has John in a whirl, and his determination to meet her prompts the taxi gang to come up with a surefire line that would unfreeze any woman on earth in Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine fears the worst when the cabbies invite themselves to her party for her highbrow art world friends who have no clue that she moonlights as a cab driver.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The high-spirited taxi gang helps a jittery Bobby fight potential disappointment when he decides that he will end his stage career if he doesn’t get an acting job before midnight.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas faces deportation unless he marries a U.S. citizen. The taxi gang comes to his rescue by pitching in and hiring a local working girl to be his bride.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: John and his new wife, Suzanne, reach a crisis point in their marriage when one of them must drop out of college due to financial woes.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A Christmas party at the garage is interrupted when Louie, the dispatcher teams up with Alex in a game of high-stakes poker against his cardshark brother Nick.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang scrambles to come up with a scheme aimed at ending a one-sided romance when a determined, pretty cabbie sets her cap for Tony and joins the Sunshine Cab Co. to be near him.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex feels sympathy for a fare who’s a real loser with the women and arranges a date for the man with Elaine, who later discovers that her klutzy companion for the evening is a U.S. Congressman.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s career dreams come true when he lands a role in a soap opera, prompting him to throw his torn-up cabbie’s license at Louie, but the dispatcher vows to take revenge if Bobby ever comes crawling back.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After an operation, Louie, the sharp-tongued dispatcher, panics when he has to keep a promise that he made to God during surgery to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas’ youthful and attractive mother makes her first visit to America, and after she and Alex meet and have an evening love affair, Latka assumes that he will soon be getting a new daddy.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Alex’s ear is nearly shot off in a holdup attempt in his cab, he stuns his fellow cabbies by quitting and exchanging his driving clothes for a waiter’s tuxedo at a snobbish French restaurant.
programme.sub-title: Alex Tastes Death & Finds A Nice Restaurant

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies fall victim to a Hollywood-style roller coaster ride when a production company visits to do a film on taxi drivers. Life at the Sunshine Cab Company turns into a continual champagne and buffet festivity.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When John crashes Cab 804, the cabbies are shocked into a period of mourning, as they reminisce about the wild and memorable events that occurred when they were driving the legendary cab.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas frantically works to save the cracked-up Cab 804 as the cabbies fondly recall times in the legendary auto when Alex delivered a baby, Louie beat a rich brat out of a wad of money, and Elaine met the perfect man.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a dream come true for Tony when he’s challenged by an aging ex-champ, but he has more than just a fight on his hand when the opposition unveils its secret weapon.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies are in for a comedy surprise when the small town kid Bobby befriends, Steve, lands a big role as Romeo the first day he arrives in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex tells Elaine that her hectic schedule of being a mother, a cabbie and a museum employee is driving her crazy and that she should see a psychiatrist. Elaine decides that a quicker cure would be to spend the night with Alex.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby and Tony’s friendship is on the line when they become embroiled in a hilarious love triangle and attempt to outdo each other in vying for the affection of a beautiful young lady.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The overweight blind date Alex once had returned to the scene a svelte shell of her former self, and eager for the romance she yearns for with Alex
programme.sub-title: The Lighter Side Of Angela Matusa

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The riotous race of the century pits Alex against Louie in a winner-take-all bet to see who can bring in the most receipts. Lecherous Louie uses every dirty trick in the book to make sure he wins his prize—an evening with Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine suddenly starts getting mysterious love letters. When she becomes intrigued by the poetic propositions, a couple of cabbies quickly claim responsibility, leaving Elaine with the hilarious task of discovering who is the amorous writer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie makes a horrible first impression on girlfriend Zena’s parents on Taxi. Louie’s romance with girlfriend Zena takes an outrageous twist when she brings him home to meet her parents.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies try to make Tony a family man when they convince him to adopt the adorably precocious eight-year-old boy named Brian whom he befriended.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica becomes a postal worker to help a bitter concentration camp survivor, whose entire family was murdered during the Holocaust, find his lost faith

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica finds herself in the middle of a struggle between a domineering woman and her son's pregnant wife, when the man goes away on a military assignment and the women are left at home together

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica steps in to help when a teen-age boy catches his father, a teacher, kissing one of his students

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica sets out to uncover the secret that binds a famous talk show host and her overweight, housebound sister

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica lends support to a woman who has begun to suspect that her son may actually be guilty of a murder for which he was tried and acquitted

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica helps a man acknowledge that his son will soon die and that he needs to accept and love his unborn grandson, who is being carried by a surrogate mother

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica becomes an assistant to a child psychologist, who, while attempting to cope with the recent loss of his daughter, is trying to dissuade a patient from believing she hears the voices of angels

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica takes a job as a teacher’s aide in order to help a man who, after teaching for 20 years, feels that he has had no positive impact on his students’ lives

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Posing as a research assistant, Monica tries to reunite an archaeologist, Henry Moskowitz, who has given up on his own family’s history, with his dying grandfather

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica is assigned to help a competitive, ambitious Secret Service agent realize that being a private hero can be just as rewarding as being a public one -- if not more so

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica’s very existence as an angel is threatened when she lies in order to help an accused man, whom she believes to be a hero, escape from police custody

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Listening to a rebroadcast of the famous 1938 Halloween night radio presentation of The War of the Worlds brings back painful memories to both Monica and esteemed author Leonard Pound

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Working as hospital employees, Monica and Tess try to show a white collar career criminal with a severe heart condition that he has the ability to help both himself and a gravely ill 13-year-old girl

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Andrew attempt to help an investigative reporter, Rocky McCann, who searches compulsively for a hidden truth in every story ever since she once failed to investigate a safety story thoroughly

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: At Christmastime, Monica finds herself apprentice to Jordan Du Bois (guest star Peter Michael Goetz), a violin maker and family man who turns his back on his beloved son when he finds out that the younger man is dying of AIDS

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica poses as an assistant to Sara Perkins, an advertising photographer who sees her overly dependent and interfering mother, Charlotte, as an obstacle to her dream of becoming a photojournalist

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Tess squares off against attorney Marc Hamilton who is representing a tobacco company that is being sued by ex-employees who claim to be victims of a second-hand smoke workplace

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica is up for a performance evaluation, but when she doesn’t show up for her appointment with the Judge of the High Court, she is suspended and stripped of all her angel privileges and power

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Hunting with the Enemy
programme.desc: An urn commissioned in a Cambodian monastery by the Chinese emperor for the remains of Confucius is about to be destroyed by systematic bombing of a whole province.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Under the Ice
programme.desc: Despite terrible weather, Sidney drags Nigel along to an Arctic base where an ancient Indian mummy has been found, who turns out to be an Anasazi.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Antianeirai
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel travel to Istanbul to investigate the death of one Sydney's friends, a professor who was trying to prove Hercules did exist by finding the Belt of Hippolyte.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Faux Fox
programme.desc: When Nigel is charmed by brilliant student Lorraine to show her their offices (and kiss), a burglar knocks out Sidney, but what was robbed?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: Sidney inherits from the best relic hunter of the previous generation a key and rushes with Nigel on the hunt for the one treasure he never found: Pandora's box.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Warlord
programme.desc: Bekkastan, 1401 AD: warrior princess Kahina proves her right to rule. 2002: Sydney and Nigel unearth a cave painting that might lead them to Kahina's Saddle. But her descendants cause complications.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: While Nigel rehearses his keynote speech in a Seville hotel room, a girl nearly breaks his nose demanding something - it turns out she was after the water from the Fountain of Youth.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Arthur's Cross
programme.desc: Scotland Yard calls Sidney and Nigel to identify a 5th century murder weapon. It turns out to be the burial cross of King Arthur, but besides the victim several others are looking for it.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: So Shall It Be
programme.desc: When Sidney and Nigel are about to enter the site of a Bristol lecture, a young author approaches them to follow up immediately on a tip about a map to the lost keys to the druid cult in Stonehenge.

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: An innocent man is condemned to the electric chair but manages to survive. Embittered, the man buys the electric chair from Lewis Vendredi.

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: A man discovers a cursed trefinator in a museum warehouse: a device that transfers intelligence, the man uses it to make himself intelligent.

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: A cursed quilt, which allows the person underneath it to dream their enemies to death, finds its way into an Amish-like Penitente community.

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: Jack and Micki return to the religious community to discover that Reverend Josiah, Ryan's future father-in-law, is using it to destroy his enemies in their dreams.
programme.sub-title: The Quilt Of Hathor: The Awakening (Part 2)

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: Winston Knight, a TV anchorman, gains great fame because a serial killer, the Machete Killer, will only contact him.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Take My Life... Please!//Devil's Alphabet/The Library
programme.desc: A comedian killed by his rival finds himself in a strange stage show; something's off/In Victorian England, Cambridge grads are bound by an oath even in death/A woman starts at an odd library.
programme.sub-title: Take My Life... Please!//Devil's Alphabet/The Library

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Shadow Play/Grace Note
programme.desc: A condemned man, Adam Grant, insists that everything and everyone around him is a dream: one that he can't wake up from/An aspiring opera singer gets an inspiring glimpse of her future, courtesy of a dying wish by her youngest sister.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: A day in Beaumont/The Last Defender of Camelot
programme.desc: In the 1950s a flying saucer crashes on Earth. The crash is seen by a couple but no one believes them/Sir Lancelot seeks the help of the sleeping Merlin in one final battle. But he soon finds himself facing off against the revived wizard.
programme.sub-title: A day in Beaumont/The Last Defender of Camelot

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: After Hours/Lost and Found
programme.desc: Marsha Cole detects shadowy figures and mysterious voices around her during a trip to a local shopping mall/College student Jennifer Templeton finds out why her possessions have been vanishing.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: The Storyteller
programme.desc: In the early 20th century a young woman takes a job as a teacher in a one-room schoolhouse. One of her students, Mica, secretly takes extra books home to read.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Witches have been a favorite of fairy tales  and fright films  for centuries. Heres a wicked look at a covens worth of portrayals.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: More than just the Devil, demons have been a mainstay of horror films since the silent days.

programme.title: Matlock: The Reunion
programme.desc: A law school class reunion proves deadly for one of Matlock’s former classmates, and Ben takes on the defense of another old friend, George Dutton, the partner of the victim.

programme.title: Matlock: The Umpire
programme.desc: Matlock attempts to defend Charlie Bonham, a softball coach who is accused of killing the umpire – who was also his boss – during the league’s playoff game.

programme.title: Matlock: Investigation (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock is surprised to learn that his long-time client, respected businessman Craig Gentry, is the son of mob boss Sam Gerard. The ace attorney must defend Craig of the murder of a senator who was investigating organized crime.

programme.title: Matlock: Investigation (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock has his hands full defending his client, Craig Gentry, while also trying to prevent a full-scale mob war from breaking out between Craig’s father and two of his enemies.

programme.title: Matlock: The Hucksters
programme.desc: Matlock is hired to defend Hal Simpson, an irate investor accused of murdering Robert Ullman, the smooth-talking owner of Fountain of Youth Elixir Creams, who was really promoting a phony get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Matlock: The Lovelorn
programme.desc: When the popular writer of an advice-to-the-lovelorn column is murdered, Matlock discovers a house full of problems and suspects.

programme.title: Matlock: The Genius
programme.desc: Ben Matlock’s nephew, Dr. Irwin Bruckner, is accused of murdering his boss, the director of a top-security think tank, and Matlock’s defense seems doomed to failure unless a master computer can be outsmarted.

programme.title: Matlock: The Magician
programme.desc: Matlock discovers he has more than one tricky suspect to contend with as he tries to defend magician Daniel Fontaine who’s accused of murdering Sandy Farrell, his ambitious and unfaithful assistant.

programme.title: Matlock: Fisherman
programme.desc: Matlock takes on the defense of Nguyen Tran, a Vietnamese fisherman accused of murdering the town bully, a man who had been terrorizing Tran and his fellow countrymen.

programme.title: Matlock: The Heiress
programme.desc: Matlock’s murder defense of Allison Tate, a young heiress with a history of mental instability, is complicated by Warren Kreitzer, a New York lawyer who is responsible for her trust fund.

programme.title: Matlock: The Lemon
programme.desc: When Matlock’s neighbor, Les Calhoun, returns a malfunctioning used car he just bought, he becomes the prime suspect in the saleman's murder. Although circumstantial evidence points to a conviction, Matlock sets out to prove his new neighbor was framed.

programme.title: Matlock: The Ambassador (Part 1)
programme.desc: When a British ambassador is accused by his lover, Shelby, of killing her husband, he refuses to hide behind diplomatic immunity and instead calls on Matlock to clear his name.

programme.title: Matlock: The Ambassador (Part 2)
programme.desc: When someone tries to kill Matlock and the British ambassador he’s defending of murder, Matlock realizes that finding his client’s vanished lover and accuser, Shelby, is the key to identifying the real killer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Mistress
programme.desc: Matlock suffers a series of mishaps when he tries to find a missing murder witness to clear his client, who’s accused of killing her philandering husband.

programme.title: Matlock: The Dj
programme.desc: Matlock must overcome his dislike of a caustic radio personality and defend him when he is accused of killing a rival disk jockey.

programme.title: Matlock: The Captain
programme.desc: Matlock defends a patrolman framed for murder and is upset when he must investigate his longtime friend, the chief of police, as the prime murder suspect.

programme.title: Matlock: The Vendetta
programme.desc: Convinced that his brother was framed for murder, a psychopath is determined to get even and holds Matlock’s associates hostage.

programme.title: Matlock: The Mayor (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock uncovers unflattering secrets about the late mayor of Chicago while defending an aging hippie activist accused of the man’s assassination.

programme.title: Matlock: The Mayor (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock’s trip to the Windy City to defend a 1960’s radical accused of murdering Chicago’s mayor comes to a head in the second part of this dramatic two-part episode.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The ladies are excited when Tyra reveals it’s time for makeovers. Hair is cut and tears are shed when the girls see their new looks for the first time.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The ladies practice their strut down a catwalk while wearing blindfolds and one girl shocks the judges when she decides to lift her dress while posing.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The contestants are thrilled when Paulina shows up to show them how to model unflattering clothing with style.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Tyra surprises the remaining girls with a one-on-one photoshoot to teach each girl how to find their most flattering pose.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: A look at never-before-seen footage of the cycle 11 contestants that includes the ladies improvising a rap in the hot tub, one girl revealing a hidden talent and a very candid chat between Tyra and the model wannabes.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The ladies pull a disappearing act for this week’s challenge.
programme.sub-title: Now You See Me, Now You Don’t

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The ladies pack their bags and head overseas to their European destination.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The remaining five girls travel around town by boat for their go sees.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Paulina offers the girls advice on how to successfully model with a variety of items, including fish and toilet paper.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In the cycle 11 finale, the three finalists put their Top Model experience to the test when they shoot their final CoverGirl commercial & print ad.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Thirty-four finalists travel to Caesar’s Palace in Las Vegas where they being their inner-goddess to the surface for their very first photoshoot.
programme.sub-title: What Happens In Vegas-Fun And Games

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls head to Bergdorff’s in New York City for makeovers! After receiving their new looks, the girls do their first photo session with Nigel Barker and must light themselves up.
programme.sub-title: Do You Light The Way You Look?

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls learn runway etiquette with Miss J and walk the runway in a Jill Stuart fashion show. Two previous Top Model contestants surprise the girls and offer runway advice.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Cycle three contestant and model Tocarra drops by to host a slumber party & teaches the girls some helpful hints for a career in the modeling business.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The house is divided and confrontational after last week’s shocking admission from one girl at the elimination panel.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls are surprised to learn they will be working opposite Clay Aiken during an acting challenge. Cycle 11 winner, McKey, stops by to offer support while the girls prepare for their CoverGirl commercial.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Catch up with the cycle 12 girls in this look back at never-before-seen footage. Brand new moments full of tears, laughter and some catfights.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The remaining girls freak when Grammy Award-winning recording artist Ciara shows up at their apartment to offer some words of advice.
programme.sub-title: Take Me To A Photo Shoot

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls land in an exotic overseas destination and immediately test their navigation skills during a scavenger hunt around the city.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The five remaining girls learn they will have to go on go-sees with five different designers around the city.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Cycle 2 Week 10
programme.desc: In the finale the three remaining models have their final photo shoot and the final two compete in a catwalk show and one girl is crowned 'Britain's Next Top Model'.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Cycle 2 Week 1
programme.desc: The competition begins. The first photo shoot takes place in the Milton Keynes SnowZone with the girls forced to withstand temperatures as low as minus 5 degrees. Immediatley Lianna feels like an outsider, not getting along with other girls.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Cycle 2 Week 2
programme.desc: The girls get their makeovers and the inevitable tears and tantrums follow. The girls pair up for a girl on girl photo shoot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Cycle 2 Week 3
programme.desc: The girls learn about cheese cake pin-up and dancing from Britain's own 'Queen of Burlesque' Immodesty Blaize. Two girls recieve harsh criticism from casting director Beth Charkham when faced with the challenge of a commercial set in a swimming pool.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Cycle 2 Week 4
programme.desc: The remaining models learn about ballroom dancing from top ballroom dancer Brendan Cole and Lianna struggles to get it right. Then they do a full dance with music. One girl gets upset when not chosen by the winner to join her for her reward.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Cycle 2 Week 5
programme.desc: The girls train with personal trainer Chris Mundle. Then straight after training, sweating and smelling, they head to meet top designers. They have a Gothic Bride photo shoot, with most girls struggling to get a good shot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Cycle 2 Week 6
programme.desc: The remaining models undergo a heavy metallic make-up photo shoot with John Swanell. Lisa arrives at the house and the girls have to critique each other, which causes even more fights. A practical joke gets taken the wrong way.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Cycle 2 Week 7
programme.desc: The girls shoot a thirty second jewellery promotion with top promo director Jason Clifford. Lucy, last years winner, visits the girls and gives them some tips. They have a country life photo shoot and there is a shock at elimination.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Cycle 2 Week 8
programme.desc: With two people gone the house becomes even more divided. The girls meet Saffron Aldridge, top style expert, who goes through their wardrobes with no mercy. They have a one on one with Lisa and the girls are awe-struck when they meet a famous model.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Cycle 2 Week 9
programme.desc: The four remaining models head to Morocco and Lisa gives them the day off. They are given the challenge of finding an outfit for Lisa. They have their first Moroccan photo shoot and the final three are chosen.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Cycle 2 Week 10
programme.desc: In the finale the three remaining models have their final photo shoot and the final two compete in a catwalk show and one girl is crowned 'Britain's Next Top Model'.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 1
programme.desc: The girls immediately face their first challenge, posing in front of the press. They then meet stylist Hilary Alexander, who asks them when they lost their virginity and what they think about unprotected sex.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 2
programme.desc: The girls take part in a catwalk challenge set by Otis Isles, the internationally respected casting director, model agent, and fashion producer, who tells them to dress in underwear.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 3
programme.desc: The girls arrive at the English National Ballet School, where Lisa introduces them to ballet teacher Louise Halliday. They learn about the art of ballet to help with their movement.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 4
programme.desc: The girls order a pizza and find Lisa Mail for the challenge the following morning. A huge fight breaks out between Stefanie and Louise.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 5
programme.desc: The girls are taken to Debenhams, where they get the chance to meet Caprice. They are given fifteen minutes to find an outfit for different occasions.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 6
programme.desc: The girls arrive at a bar where they meet music video director Paul Hills. Their challenge is to star in a music video along with The Wolfmen.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 7
programme.desc: The girls are woken up by a grueling morning workout from Celebrity Personal Trainer Nicki Waterman. Some struggle with the workout, especially Sherece.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 8
programme.desc: The girls arrive at Models 1, where they meet Mark Evans along with casting agents. They take a Polaroid shot for a casting. Mark announces that they will be going to Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, but there are only four places on the plane.
